# Let's read the provided text file to get the exact content and compute indices.
path = '/mnt/data/file-M17wTXWPND1nxN8Dpnrhd1-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
text, len(text)

# Define the quoted spans to find
spans = [
    "بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم",
    "وقل اعملوا فسيرى الله عملكم ورسوله والمؤمنون",
    "إن هذه أمتكم أمة واحدة وأنا ربكم فاعبدون"
]

indices = []
for s in spans:
    i = text.find(s)
    indices.append((s, i, i+len(s)))
indices

output.code:
import json

text = ' بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم "وقل اعملوا فسيرى الله عملكم ورسوله والمؤمنون". (سورة التوبة, الآية 105) يشير هذا الحديث الشريف إلى أننا مسؤولون عن أفعالنا الخاصة وأن لدينا الإرادة الحرة لاختيار طريقنا الخاص. كما يقول الله تعالى في القرآن الكريم "إن هذه أمتكم أمة واحدة وأنا ربكم فاعبدون" (سورة الأنبياء آية 92). وهذا يعني ضمنا أنه ينبغي علينا اتباع دين واحد واتباع أوامر الله لكي نكون متحدين وننجو في الآخرة.'

spans = [
    {
        "span_text": "بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم",
        "citation_type": "Aya",
        "aya_reference": {"sura_name": "الفاتحة", "sura_number": 1, "aya_number": 1},
        "corrected_text": "بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ"
    },
    {
        "span_text": "وقل اعملوا فسيرى الله عملكم ورسوله والمؤمنون",
        "citation_type": "Aya",
        "aya_reference": {"sura_name": "التوبة", "sura_number": 9, "aya_number": 105},
        "corrected_text": "وَقُلِ ٱعْمَلُوا فَسَيَرَى ٱللَّهُ عَمَلَكُمْ وَرَسُولُهُ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ ۖ وَسَتُرَدُّونَ إِلَىٰ عَٰلِمِ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَٰدَةِ فَيُنَبِّئُكُم بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ"
    },
    {
        "span_text": "إن هذه أمتكم أمة واحدة وأنا ربكم فاعبدون",
        "citation_type": "Aya",
        "aya_reference": {"sura_name": "الأنبياء", "sura_number": 21, "aya_number": 92},
        "corrected_text": "إِنَّ هَٰذِهِ أُمَّتُكُمْ أُمَّةً وَٰحِدَةً وَأَنَا رَبُّكُمْ فَاعْبُدُونِ"
    }
]

# Compute indices
out = {"citations": []}
for s in spans:
    start = text.find(s["span_text"])
    end = start + len(s["span_text"]) if start != -1 else -1
    item = {
        "span_start": start,
        "span_end": end,
        "span_text": s["span_text"],
        "citation_type": s["citation_type"],
        "is_valid": False,  # since user text lacks diacritics relative to canonical
        "aya_reference": s["aya_reference"],
        "hadeeth_reference": {},
        "corrected_text": s["corrected_text"],
        "completely_invalid": False
    }
    out["citations"].append(item)

print(json.dumps(out, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":1,"span_end":23,"span_text":"بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"الفاتحة","sura_number":1,"aya_number":1},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ","completely_invalid":false},{"span_start":25,"span_end":69,"span_text":"وقل اعملوا فسيرى الله عملكم ورسوله والمؤمنون","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"التوبة","sura_number":9,"aya_number":105},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"وَقُلِ ٱعْمَلُوا فَسَيَرَى ٱللَّهُ عَمَلَكُمْ وَرَسُولُهُ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ ۖ وَسَتُرَدُّونَ إِلَىٰ عَٰلِمِ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَٰدَةِ فَيُنَبِّئُكُم بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ","completely_invalid":false},{"span_start":239,"span_end":279,"span_text":"إن هذه أمتكم أمة واحدة وأنا ربكم فاعبدون","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"الأنبياء","sura_number":21,"aya_number":92},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"إِنَّ هَٰذِهِ أُمَّتُكُمْ أُمَّةً وَٰحِدَةً وَأَنَا رَبُّكُمْ فَاعْبُدُونِ","completely_invalid":false}]}

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
